name: React Developer Path
description: Curated learning roadmap to master modern React concepts from Fundamentals to Advanced State and Performance.

phases.name: Phase 1: React Fundamentals
phases.description: Master JSX, component building blocks, props, events, and state basics.

phases.name: Phase 2: Hooks & Side Effects
phases.description: Learn lifecycle side effects with useEffect, DOM interactions with useRef, and custom hooks.

phases.name: Phase 3: Performance Optimization
phases.description: Optimizing React render cycles, reconciliation, and virtualization.

phases.name: Phase 4: Advanced Patterns
phases.description: Compound components, render props, higher-order components, and portals.

phases.name: Phase 5: State Management
phases.description: Advanced Context API, custom selectors, state machines, and global state without external packages.

phases.name: Phase 6: Accessibility & Production
phases.description: Focus on ARIA, keyboard navigation, accessible forms, and automated testing.

phases.name: Phase 7: Machine Coding Challenges
phases.description: Build robust components like File Tree, Typeahead, Toasts, Drag & Drop, and Infinite Scroll.

phases.name: Phase 8: Architecture & Leadership
phases.description: Code modernization, scale design systems, performance budgets, and organizational alignment.
